title: Micamberlecto

{{Quote|Our very fine New Republic sent me in as a Governor-General, but what is there for me to govern? Where are my tools to govern with? These last years, the Corellians have learned to pay me no mind. I have a huge, a huge shortage of skilled, politically reliable people.|Micamberlecto|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
'''Micamberlecto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Frozian/Legends|Frozian]] appointed by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to replace [[Diktat]] [[Daclif Gallamby]] as [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] when it joined the New Republic in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].

==History==
===Early life and ruling the Corellian sector===
{{Quote|On Froz we have a saying. 'Things are bad when there are more questions than answers, but worse, but worse, when there are more answers than questions.'|Micamberlecto|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
Micamberlecto was born on [[Froz]]. He developed a condition of depression that only slightly broke when, in 12 ABY, the Corellian sector joined the New Republic and Micamberlecto was asked to rule it as its Governor-General, replacing the pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Diktat, Daclif Gallamby. Micamberlecto happily accepted, believing that he would be a symbol of dignity and pride for the Frozian species, and moved into [[Corona House/Legends|Corona House]], the house of Corellia's chief executive.<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier" />

His depression deepened, however, when he went to fill the vacant government positions below him.<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier" /> Due to the lack of New Republic supporters, Micamberlecto was forced to appoint many ex-Imperials to his government.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" /> Additionally, many ex-Imperials had been elected to local positions by the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] people, resulting in pro-Imperial factions having large influence and leaving very little for Micamberlecto to freely govern. With the strict oversight of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and its successor, the Galactic Empire, now gone, many Corellians no longer accepted the rule of outside forces, such as the New Republic and Micamberlecto. One Corellian, the former deputy to Diktat Gallamby, [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], formed a [[Humanocentrism|human-supremacist]] group called the [[Human League]], that began working towards a plot to overthrow Micamberlecto and take control of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier" />

===The First Corellian Insurrection===
{{Quote|It's hard to know anything. Too little staff. They are all here, working, and all loyal and trusted, but half the com systems are down. We are helpless, helpless to do more than watch.|Micamberlecto at the beginning of the First Corellian Insurrection|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
In [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] the situation on Corellia began to deteriorate. The Human League began openly opposing Micamberlecto and held nightly torch-light marches around Corona House, where they sang anti-[[Alien/Legends|Alien]] and anti-New Republic songs, started fights, and broke windows on nearby buildings. Additionally, Micamberlecto's influence grew so little that he stopped bothering to call Corellia's military agencies, the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] and the [[Public Safety Service]], as he wasn't sure if they were on his side and he feared that they would join in the marches against him.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" /> Micamberlecto asked the New Republic for help, and it was decided that a [[Corellian Trade Summit|trade summit]] would be held there and attended by New Republic [[Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], in order to bring light to the planet's problems.<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier" /> Three days prior to the scheduled trade summit, Micamberlecto was delivered a message by a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] picked up by the Corellian Defense Force that contained an image of a star explosion along with space-and-time coordinates. His scientists informed him that the type of star in the image could not have exploded on its own.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />

After having dinner with Organa Solo and her [[Solo family/Legends|family]], Micamberlecto looked outside the window of his study with Organa Solo and her husband, Han, and explained Corellia's issues to them as the Human League held another one of their marches below them. The next day, Micamberlecto attended the trade summit, where he greeted delegates alongside Organa Solo. Later that night, he was called into Organa Solo's apartment in Corona House to listen to a [[Message cube]] that had been delivered to them and was addressed to the Chief of State, her husband, and the Governor-General. The message cube contained a list of stellar coordinates that Micamberlecto immediately connected with the message he had received earlier.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />

The next day, the Human League launched their [[Corellian Crisis|insurrection]] by turning on a massive interdiction field that covered the entire Corellian system, allowing no communications and easy travel in or out. In a Selonian neighborhood in the city of [[Bela Vistal/Legends|Bela Vistal]], a Human League member threw a punch, causing a chain reaction that eventually escalated into full scale rioting across the planet between different species and the Selonian Enclave falling under attack. The ground-based units of the Corellian Defense Force remained loyal to Micamberlecto and attempted to stop the rioting, but the space-based units were on the side of the Human League and helped secure positions such as the CDF's navy yard. While the streets of Corellia's capital, [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] were filled with fighting and blaster fire, Micamberlecto worked in his office inside Corona House with his staff to gather as much information as possible on what was going on.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />

The Human League then attacked Corona House by firing a rocket at it, damaging several floors. Micamberlecto along with Organa Solo and Han were trapped inside, although their family managed to escape on the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'' immediately after. That evening, Micamberlecto, his staff, and the two Solos gathered around a holoscreen when a message delivered by Sal-Solo himself began to play. Sal-Solo declared Micamberlecto's government illegitimate and that he was the rightful ruler of Corellia, along with claiming that the Human League had the ability to destroy stars and would do so if all non-humans were not deported off the planet.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" /> Eventually, the Human League took control of Corona House and Organa Solo was captured and locked inside a bedroom that was being used as a makeshift cell.<ref name="Assault at Selonia">''[[Assault at Selonia]]''</ref> While the League members ransacked the building, Micamberlecto was killed by Sal-Solo,<ref name="Cracken's Threat Dossier" /> along with many of his staff.<ref name="Assault at Selonia" />
